series_metadata.series_description: DVR recording system that is part of the security system that records designated areas on OOD premises. The system is a re-write loop with a maximum capacity.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: system is a re-write loop. Recordings are overwritten continuously. Recordings are retained a minimum of (twenty) 20 days. re-write period may be longer than (twenty) 20 days depending on length of each motion activated recording
